purpose: Track where original arcade objects land in Genesis ROM builds and where generated stubs/trampolines replace original control flow.

rules.policy: When feasible, copied original code/data retains its original ROM address in the Genesis build.
Any generated stub or trampoline must be listed in the per-build relocation map with the original range it replaces and the reason it exists.
Relocation maps are emitted from original ROM input on every build; derived binaries are never used as translation inputs.
